typography.pairing_strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' / Authority approach. High contrast weight differences. Outfit for Headings and Work Sans for body.

layout_and_spacing.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, metrics, and dense content for better readability.

cards.default: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-gray-200), no shadow, rounded-sm (4px radius).

slide_view.background: Use presentation_grid_bg with generous padding (p-12 to p-24) to simulate a slide canvas. Must be clearly boxed like a 16:9 slide presentation.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002380] rounded-sm px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-sm px-6 py-2 transition-colors

charts.style: Use Shadcn chart components or Recharts. Clear labels, no 3D effects. Use International Klein Blue, Emerald Green, Warning Yellow, and Signal Red.

navigation.header: Sticky header (z-50) with backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80, 1px bottom border (border-gray-200). Must contain Logo + Nav Links + Primary CTA. Links visible on desktop.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have hover states. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/50
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-in for lists and grid items.

icons.style: Regular or Duotone for dense dashboards.

testing.attributes: All interactive/key elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='kpi-card', data-testid='slide-nav-next')

backgrounds.description: Use for the 'Slide-style Leadership Brief view' background canvas.

avatars.description: Use for stakeholders, responsible owners of action plans, or leadership profiles.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard fonts for Headings. Use Outfit for Headings and Work Sans for body.
Implement the app as a multi-view dashboard: an Executive Summary view, a Slide-style Leadership view, a Detailed Compliance Findings view, and a KPI Definitions page.
Ensure 'Slide-style' view resembles an executive presentation deck (16:9 ratio containers, presentation_grid_bg background, minimal text, high visual impact).
Use Phosphor icons. Add 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' to dependencies.
For charts, use Shadcn Charts or Recharts. Ensure clear tooltips and data density.
Use Signal Red (#DC2626) exclusively for SLA breaches or high risks, Warning Yellow for pending issues, Emerald Green for success.
Cards should use the 'Technical' Grid Borders look: Flat white backgrounds, 1px subtle borders, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6), with sharp or max 4px border-radius.
All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' attributes.
